summary: Crash Safety Audit Backend Testing Complete - All 23 tests passed (100%). Verified error handling in acting-coach/analyze, dialect/analyze, daily-drill/feedback endpoints. All AI endpoints return structured responses, validation errors return proper 422 codes, and watermark field is included in share responses.
critical_code_review_comments: acting-coach/analyze (line 2388): Proper error handling with JSONDecodeError and Exception catches, returns structured JSON error messages
dialect/analyze (line 2178): Has fallback analysis if GPT parsing fails, provides default feedback values
daily-drill/feedback (line 2700): Has try/except with fallback mock feedback generation if AI fails
Pydantic validation working correctly: min_length, ge/le constraints enforced with proper 422 responses
All endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
seed_data_creation: Created test users and data with TEST_ prefix for various endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Crash safety audit completed successfully. All 4 files mentioned in the fix (voice-studio.tsx, daily-drill.tsx, selftape/review.tsx, server.py) have proper error handling. Backend API regression tests all pass. Key findings: 1) GET /api/health returns healthy status, 2) Daily drill endpoints return all required fields (id, prompt, challenge_type, xp_reward), 3) POST /api/daily-drill/{user_id}/feedback returns structured feedback with emotion/pacing/delivery/confidence/overall_note, 4) GET /api/streak/{user_id} returns current_streak/best_streak/total_xp/today_completed/activities_today, 5) POST /api/acting-coach/analyze returns success:true with analysis object containing all required fields, 6) Validation errors return 422 with structured Pydantic error messages, 7) Share endpoint includes watermark field.

tests_performed.test: GET /api/daily-drill/{user_id} returns drill with id, prompt, challenge_type, xp_reward
POST /api/acting-coach/analyze returns success:true with analysis object
POST /api/tapes/share creates share link with share_id
GET /api/tapes/share/{share_id} returns share with watermark field
